description: Use the model to classify each prompt into one of the §7.5 intents with a confidence score. Below `agent.minimumIntentConfidence`, downgrade execution mode to confirmation-required. `unknown` intent fails closed.
notes: The classifier prompt is critical; document it in `docs/AGENT_RUNTIME.md`.
steps: TDD: Direct command prompts classify as `shell_command`.
TDD: Document summary prompts classify as `document_summary`.
TDD: Quote / download prompts classify as `document_text_search`.
TDD: Outlook search prompts classify as `email_search`.
TDD: Outlook mark / move prompts classify as `email_mutation`.
TDD: Confidence score returned in 0..1 range.
TDD: Confidence below threshold downgrades mode.
Author the classifier as a model call returning structured JSON `{intent, confidence, reasons}`.
name: [tr-05] Intent classifier with confidence
